concerns.text: Tasks T076 and T077 are sequentially dependent (checksum generation before manifest update) but both are marked [P] (parallel-safe). This creates a potential race condition or incorrect manifest if executed concurrently.

concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 3: User Story 1 - Automated Consistency Audit
concerns.text: Tasks T069 and T092 are marked [P] but depend on T026 (synthetic dataset generation).  Executing them in parallel could lead to errors if the synthetic dataset isn't fully generated before they start.

The description of Phase 2 states 'No user story work can begin until this phase is complete'. However, several tasks within User Story 1 (e.g., T017, T018) could potentially begin *before* all foundational tasks are finished, as they don't all directly depend on the foundational tasks. Clarify dependencies.

concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 4: User Story 4 - Efficient CI Execution
concerns.text: T046/T047 (resource monitoring) do not explicitly implement the abort behavior described in FR-009 (abort with ERR-301 if limits exceeded). This is a gap between requirement and implementation.

concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 3: User Story 1 - Automated Consistency Audit
concerns.text: T097 (Quickstart timing) only measures execution time, not verification by a 'novice user' as required by SC-028. This is a partial implementation of the success criteria.
